title: Pelagic identity-wordlist commit landed
body: Pelagic Swimming Rudder landed identity-wordlist/session-cache work at ea7d3e01. Live pre-commit gates passed: format-check, markdownlint, knip, depcruise, and turbo type-check/lint/test (74/74). Commit-queue intent 5ea94a14 is complete and all Pelagic identity claims are closed. Tooling friction observed during landing: comms send no longer accepts the old --log option; commit-queue enqueue no longer accepts --active; --help remains parsed as requiring a value on commit-queue enqueue.
